title: GCD and LCM
description: Given two positive integers a and b, print their Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) and Least Common Multiple (LCM) on a single line, separated by a space.
inputSpec: Two integers a and b on a single line.
outputSpec: GCD(a,b) and LCM(a,b) separated by a space.

botCodes.code:
from math import gcd
a, b = map(int, input().split())
g = gcd(a, b)
print(g, a * b // g)

def gcd(a, b):
    while b:
        a, b = b, a % b
    return a

a, b = map(int, input().split())
g = gcd(a, b)
print(g, a * b // g)
